steps.expected: Lists commands: run, info, report, upload
steps.observed: Commands section lists: run, info, report, upload with descriptions

steps.expected: Documents scope/selective-run flags and output path options
steps.observed: Shows --compute-only, --memory-only, --interconnect-only scope flags, --output/-o PATH option, and --upload flag

evidence.terminal_output_help:
Usage: ornn-bench [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
Commands: run, info, report, upload

steps.expected: Reports detected GPU/dependency status and prints actionable remediation when GPU/tools are missing
steps.observed: Shows System (OS, Kernel, CPU), GPU section (nvidia-smi not found + remediation: 'Install NVIDIA GPU drivers'), Python (version, PyTorch status), and Benchmark Tools table listing nvidia-smi, nvbandwidth, nccl-tests each with '✗ missing' status and actionable install/build instructions with URLs

evidence.terminal_output:
System: Darwin 25.3.0, Apple M4
GPU: nvidia-smi not found on PATH — Install NVIDIA GPU drivers.
Python: 3.14.0, PyTorch not installed
Benchmark Tools: nvidia-smi (✗ missing, docs.nvidia.com link), nvbandwidth (✗ missing, github source link), nccl-tests (✗ missing, github source link)

steps.action: Run `ornn-bench run` on macOS host without NVIDIA GPU
steps.expected: Exits gracefully with clear guidance and no crash
steps.observed: Displays styled panel 'No NVIDIA GPU Detected' with explanation, 3-step remediation list, cloud instance tip, driver install URL, and suggestions to use 'info' or 'report' commands instead. Exits with code 1. No traceback or crash.

evidence.terminal_output:
╭─── No NVIDIA GPU Detected ───╮
No NVIDIA GPU detected: nvidia-smi not found on PATH.
To run GPU benchmarks you need:
  1. A machine with an NVIDIA GPU
  2. NVIDIA drivers installed
  3. CUDA toolkit installed
If you are on a cloud instance, ensure you selected a GPU instance type.
https://docs.nvidia.com/datacenter/tesla/driver-installation-guide/
You can still use 'ornn-bench info' or 'ornn-bench report <file>'.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All CLI UX assertions verified on macOS non-GPU host.
